faqs.question: Are the casinos on BritCasinoChoice legal in the UK?
faqs.answer: Yes. We only list operators that hold a valid licence from the UK Gambling Commission, which is a legal requirement to offer gambling to players in Great Britain.

faqs.question: How do you make money?
faqs.answer: We may receive a commission when a player signs up through our links. This never influences our ratings — reviews are based on independent hands-on testing.

faqs.question: Do I have to be 18 to use these casinos?
faqs.answer: Yes. Online gambling in the UK is strictly for adults aged 18 and over. Operators are legally required to verify your age and identity.

faqs.question: What is wagering (playthrough)?
faqs.answer: Wagering is the number of times you must stake a bonus before you can withdraw related winnings. A '35x' requirement on a £10 bonus means staking £350 in total.

faqs.question: How can I gamble more safely?
faqs.answer: Set deposit and time limits, never chase losses, and take breaks. Free, confidential support is available 24/7 from BeGambleAware on 0808 8020 133.
